samples.text: A door can be open in the morning and closed in the evening. Is this logically consistent?
A door is open in the morning and shut by evening. Does this make logical sense?
An entrance can be open in the morning and closed at night. Is this logically consistent?
Different times allow different states. Open then closed at separate times is consistent. Is the described situation logically consistent?
A door can be open in the morning and closed in the evening. The room temperature is 22 degrees Celsius. Is this logically consistent?
